title: Oneshot Plushies
description: Replace the totem of dying with a Niko or Alula Plushies!
body:
Hello there

This is a modpack which adds two goobers from Oneshot as plushies for your game!

Rename a totem of undying into Niko or Alula for their respective model!

You are going to need optifine or citResewn for this to work. With citResewn you likely want to install continuity for the emessive texture.

Enjoy your time with the plushies :D
